Construction · Branding & Social

Haswani Construction
Brand Identity & Social Media

Client
Haswani Construction
Category
Construction · Branding & Social
Year
2023–2024
Status
Completed

Overview

Haswani Construction Group is a trusted, innovative leader in the construction and infrastructure industry. Ninearc was engaged to strengthen their brand identity and digital presence, positioning them as a credible partner for high-quality construction projects while engaging clients, partners, and stakeholders online.

The Challenge

The construction industry is competitive and trust-driven. Haswani needed a modern, professional brand presence that communicated their expertise and reliability — both visually and through their content — to win higher-value commercial and residential contracts.

Our Approach

Ninearc created a professional and modern visual identity, including logo refinement, colour palette, and brand guidelines reflecting the company's expertise and reliability. We executed a targeted social media campaign showcasing completed projects, behind-the-scenes insights, and thought leadership content — designed to highlight Haswani's capabilities and establish credibility within the industry.

Deliverables

  • Complete Brand Identity System
  • Logo & Visual Guidelines
  • Social Media Strategy
  • Instagram & Facebook Management
  • Project Photography Direction
  • Monthly Content Production
  • Client Testimonial Campaigns
